hero.titlePart1: Know if the clinic is right
hero.subtitle: Avoid the stress of inaccessible healthcare. Search clinics with verified wheelchair access, hearing support, and quiet environments.

clinics.subtitle: Verified facilities with high marks for physical and sensory accommodation.
clinics.communityVerified: Every accessibility feature at this location has been community-verified within the last 30 days.

howItWorks.title: Search with Confidence
howItWorks.subtitle: We remove the physical and emotional barriers to healthcare, step-by-step.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your location and the healthcare specialty you need.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Select the exact mobility or sensory accommodations you require.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Arrive knowing exactly how the facility will accommodate your needs.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.subtitle: Accessibility data is verified by facility managers and community members to ensure zero surprises.

cta.title: Find the right care,
cta.subtitle: Join our community and help us build a world where healthcare is truly accessible to all.

footer.mission: Empowering everyone to access healthcare with dignity, clarity, and total confidence.
footer.copyright: © {year} AccessClinic. Access is a right, not a privilege.

clinicDetails.bookAppointmentNote: Confirm the visit time and add any accessibility notes before booking.
clinicDetails.aboutText: Dedicated to providing inclusive healthcare with a focus on physical and sensory accommodations. Our facility is designed to ensure everyone receives care in a comfortable environment.
clinicDetails.review1Text: The wheelchair access here is phenomenal. The automatic doors and wide corridors made my visit completely stress-free.
clinicDetails.review2Text: I requested a quiet room due to sensory overload, and the staff were incredibly accommodating. Highly recommend.
clinicDetails.review3Text: Great facility overall. The accessible restrooms are well-equipped, though the signage could be slightly larger.

clinicListing.pageSubtitle: Find clinics that match your accessibility needs in minutes.
clinicListing.emptyMessage: Try removing one or more filters to see more clinics.
clinicListing.errorTitle: We could not load clinics right now
clinicListing.errorMessage: Check your connection and try again.
clinicListing.staleNotice: Showing the latest saved results while we reconnect.

booking.title: Book your appointment
booking.subtitle: Choose a date and time that works for you. We will keep your accessibility needs in context.
booking.notePlaceholder: Add anything the clinic should know before your visit
booking.requiredField: Please enter your name to continue.

bookingSuccess.title: Appointment booked successfully
bookingSuccess.subtitle: Your booking has been confirmed. The clinic has received your details and accessibility preferences.

onboarding.step1Title: Who are you setting up this account for?
onboarding.patientDesc: I am looking for accessible healthcare for myself.
onboarding.caregiverDesc: I am helping someone else find accessible care.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Select any that apply to personalize your experience. You can change this later.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Do you (or the person you care for) have any chronic medical conditions? This helps clinics prepare for your visit.
onboarding.step4Subtitle: Here is a quick summary of your preferences. You can update these anytime in your profile.

profile.title: Your accessibility and visits
profile.subtitle: Keep your needs current so booking and clinic review flows can stay focused.
profile.name: Name
profile.noBookingsDesc: When you confirm an appointment, it will appear here.

admin.title: Clinic operations
admin.subtitle: Manage Firestore clinic records and watch the activity coming from patients.
admin.noClinicsDesc: Add the first clinic to populate the public clinics page.
